Petition Of Successor Trustee For Reimbursement Of Funds Advanced For Beneficiary Of Trust For Monthly Allowance For Living Expenses Of Beneficiary And For Authority To Invest Trust Estate In Different Financial Institutions In Blocked Accounts
Off Calendar Dec-01-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Franchesca Callejo for and with Carla Homer (Trustee).

Ms. Callejo stated that she and her client reviewed the Examiner's notes this morning, that she checked with the bookkeeper and the monthly income is $2,100.00, that what Ms. Homer is asking for would not compromise the principal amount, and noted that since Destiny had moved in her male tenant had moved out. In addition, she informed the Court that there was a delay in getting the death certificate which delayed the SSI and during that time period her client covered the expenses. She also noted that her client drives the minor to and from school in San Francisco, that she pays for her cell phone, storage, etc. She stated that her client is asking for reimbursement and a monthly allowance which would be $1032.00 beginning October 2008 for the basic overhead to cover shelter, utilities, and the commute. Ms. Callejo to amend the order and submit it to the Court. A Status hearing was set December 22, 2008 for status on the receipts for the blocked account.

Judge: Raymond Arata. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda./R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (844-850 Shrader St., San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Jan-28-2008 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Franchesca Callejo for the Petitioner.

The sale was confirmed at $1,380,000.00. A bond in the amount of $200,000.00 is required. The remaining balance of the proceeds are to be deposited into a blocked account. The matter was granted subject to a written order. Ms. Callejo will submit the order. The matter was set for March 17, 2008 for status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account.

Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.
Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee Bond And Power To Sell Real Property
Off Calendar Oct-29-2007 Granted Per Written Order
